title: IDOR / BOLA
description: NotesVault checks that you're authenticated but never that you own the resource you're asking for. Read the admin's private note.

hints.text: Log in as guest. Now look at the URL pattern — /api/users/<user_id>/notes. What if you change the ID?
Admin's user ID is unsurprising for a demo app. Try 1, 1000, 1001.
